actionConfiguration.body:
SELECT t.*, p.nome AS responsavel_nome
FROM public.vw_tickets t
LEFT JOIN public.perfis p ON p.id = t.responsavel
WHERE t.ativo = TRUE
  AND ({{sel_rel_empresa.selectedOptionValue || ''}} = '' OR t.empresa::TEXT = {{"'" + sel_rel_empresa.selectedOptionValue + "'"}})
  AND t.data_reclamacao >= ({{ dp_rel_inicio.selectedDate ? "'" + moment(dp_rel_inicio.selectedDate).format('YYYY-MM-DD') + "'" : "'1970-01-01'" }})::DATE
  AND t.data_reclamacao <= ({{ dp_rel_fim.selectedDate ? "'" + moment(dp_rel_fim.selectedDate).format('YYYY-MM-DD') + "'" : "'2099-12-31'" }})::DATE
ORDER BY t.data_reclamacao DESC;
